content.en:
Ye Tian's things were quickly sold, and a total of about 90,000 Taigu Gold was sold.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian put the treasure in the Huanyu Tower, and the other party also put Taikoo Jin in the Huanyu Tower, and there was no need to meet, and the Huanyu Tower was responsible for completing the transaction process.

Soon.

Ninety thousand Taigu Gold fell into Ye Tian's hands.

After that, he bought Taiyuan Gold Water, a total of thirteen drops of Taiyuan Gold Water, and spent 26,000 Taigu Gold.

He also wanted to buy more Taiyuan Gold Water, but unfortunately there was no Taiyuan Gold Water for sale on it.

If it weren't for his high trading authority and the first step to see the Taiyuan gold water sold by others, he wouldn't have been able to grab these thirteen drops of Taiyuan gold water.

"Thirteen drops of Taiyuan gold water is far from enough, I am an ancient-level genius, if I want to break through the realm, I am afraid that I need a lot of Taiyuan gold water!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he refined the thirteen drops of Taiyuan gold water to test the effect.

Rumble!!!!

The effect of Taiyuan Golden Water is indeed very good, far surpassing the blood of Dragon Gold.

With the flesh and blood of his primeval-level genius, he could feel that the primeval golden water was constantly refining his heart, making his heart stronger and stronger.

But as time passed, the thirteen drops of Taiyuan gold water gradually ran out.

"The effect of Taiyuan Golden Water is indeed very good, but unfortunately the quantity is too small, I need at least a thousand drops of Taiyuan Golden Water to quench my heart to the limit of the Three Blood Transformation Realms!" Ye Tian estimated.

This is just tempered to the limit, if you want to break the shackles, then it is not clear how much Taiyuan gold water is needed.

Therefore, if he wants to obtain a large amount of Taiyuan Gold Water, it is not possible to rely only on the Universal Time and Space Trading Network, and he has to find a way to obtain or find Taiyuan Gold Water by himself.

In the following years, Ye Tian carefully learned about the situation of Taiyuan Jinshui in Huanyu Tower, wanting to know where Taiyuan Jinshui was abundant.

"Taiyuan Mountain!"

Taiyuan gold water basically comes from the ancient treasure of Taiyuan Mountain.

However, Taiyuan Mountain was not occupied by any force or race, and belonged to the open Taigu Treasure Land.

The reason why it was not occupied is because there is something special about the ancient treasure land of Taiyuan Mountain.

There is an ancient race in Taiyuan Mountain, and it is a very powerful ancient race.

According to intelligence, this primeval race is called the primeval giant tortoise clan, and Taiyuan Mountain is carried on its tortoise shell.

The cultivation of this primeval giant tortoise had reached the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and the terror of defense was that even many powerhouses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm could not break it.

Luckily, this ancient tortoise likes to sleep, so it won't wake up as long as no one disturbs it.

Because of this, no force is willing to occupy Taiyuan Mountain, otherwise it will be miserable if the primeval giant tortoise is awakened.

In addition, the seven blood transformation realms are above cultivation, and they can't get close to Taiyuan Mountain.

There were only seven Blood Transformation Realm creatures that had passed, reviving the primeval giant tortoise.

After that, the primeval giant tortoise swallowed the seventh-time Blood Transformation creature in one gulp, and fell into a deep sleep again.

From then on, the powerhouses of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm would not go to Taiyuan Mountain again.

But Taiyuan Mountain is a little dangerous, if the strength is insufficient, it is easy to fall.

The most suitable cultivation for going to Taiyuan Mountain is the five blood transformation realm and the six blood transformation realm, so many Heavenly Ancestors who have five or six blood transformation realms will go to Taiyuan Mountain to adventure, if they find a lot of treasures, then they will earn.

After Ye Tian carefully understood the information of Taiyuan Mountain, he was ready to go to Taiyuan Mountain.

Taiyuan Mountain is a little far away from Huanyu City, and it is even farther away from White Elephant City.

Ye Tian set off from Huanyu City and kept shuttling in the shock current of the territorial sea boundary gap.

Along the way, he didn't encounter any trouble, and it was much safer than the territory near White Elephant City.

At the very least, without exposing the huge wealth, even a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor would dare to run around.

If it were on the side of White Elephant City, a cultivator of the Blood Transformation Realm would run around, I am afraid that he would die soon.

......

After continuous hurrying, Ye Tian finally arrived at Taiyuan Mountain.

"What a powerful breath!"

Ye Tian felt the breath of the primeval giant tortoise, the other party was still in a state of sleep, and the aura was restrained, and just a little breath that escaped made a Heavenly Ancestor of the Blood Transformation Realm feel terrifying.

It is conceivable that once the primeval giant tortoise awakens, its strength will be terrifying.

Swish!

Ye Tian approached the Ancient Giant Tortoise, and then went straight to the Taiyuan Mountain Treasure Land on its back.

The Taiyuan Mountain Treasure Land is a complete Ancient Treasure Land, with only one entrance, and it is like an abyss that swallows the incoming Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses into it.

As soon as Ye Tian approached this entrance, he was sucked by a suction.

He could resist, but there was no need.

In an instant, Ye Tian entered Taiyuan Mountain through this entrance.

Inside Taiyuan Mountain.

The suppression here is very large, not only from the Taiyuan Mountain Treasure Land, but also from the Ancient Giant Tortoise, causing every Blood Transformation Realm powerhouse to feel as if they are burdened with an unimaginable heaviness after entering here.

"I have to find Taiyuan Golden Water, I hope I can find enough Taiyuan Golden Water!" Ye Tian said expectantly.

Swish!

He chose a direction and quickly fled.

Soon, he encountered the native creatures of Taiyuan Mountain.

Rumble!!!

He was stopped by a creature of the Blood Transformation Realm five times, this Blood Transformation Realm creature looked very strange, obviously a snake-like creature, but the skin scales on its body were like pieces of turtle shells.

Ye Tian guessed that this creature must have changed under the influence of the breath of the primeval giant tortoise, and possessed the bloodline of the primeval giant tortoise.

It can be said that the native creatures of Taiyuan Mountain all have primeval bloodline, although they are not primeval races, but their strength is very extraordinary.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with it, easily suppressed the other party, and just injured it, it ran away.

The other party ran away, and Ye Tian didn't chase after him, his purpose was just to find Taiyuan Jinshui.

On the way that followed, he encountered many native creatures, but he also encountered other cultivators and some foreign creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm.

However, after searching for a long time, he did not find a drop of Taiyuan gold water.

"If you find it like this, the efficiency is too slow, and it's too difficult to get together thousands of drops of Taiyuan gold water!"

Ye Tian thought about it, it seemed that there was only one way to quickly obtain Taiyuan Golden Water, and that was to blend in with the native creatures here.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a giant tortoise-like blood transformation realm creature, the other party was a native creature here, and such a giant tortoise-like blood transformation realm creature seemed to be not weak in Taiyuan Mountain.

Therefore, after he was going to kill this giant tortoise-like blood mutant creature, he copied a giant tortoise-like blood mutant creature to copy the body, so that he mixed into this race.
